About this item

  • NO WATER SPOTS OR STREAKS - Only one pass and your car will be 100% dry, streak-free and will have zero water spots. Our Twisted Loop Technology allows the towel to glide across the surface of your car and pick up every single drop of water. It can absorb up to an entire gallon!
  • SIZE MATTERS - The Blackline Drying Towel is 2ft x 3ft allowing it to quickly dry the surface area of your vehicle. Not only is it huge, but it glides across your vehicle without scratching the paint at all. Size does matter when it comes to car drying towels.
  • ULTRA-ABSORBENT & EFFECTIVE - We designed the Blackline Drying Towel to be built for speed and performance. This towel strives to be the most absorbent, quick-drying towel on the car detailing market. It absorbs more than 6x its weight in water and can dry your entire car in one go!
  • ONE TOWEL IS ALL YOU NEED - Say goodbye to using towel after towel. It might be crazy to think about, but one pass is all you need with the Blackline Drying Towel. Your car will be completely dry and all you need is a single towel.
  • APPROVED BY PRO DETAILERS - Used and loved by professional car detailers and weekend warriors alike. It was specifically designed to be easy to use and to guarantee an effective drying experience every single time.

Materials & Care
Material Type Microfiber 1300GSM
Fabric Weight 1300 Grams per Square Meter
Product Care Instructions 1. Washing the Drying Towel: Use a mild detergent without any special additives to prevent any potential harm to the microfiber material. Wash the towel in cold water. Ensure that the washing machine contains only clean towels, as cross-contamination with substances like brake dust or wax can compromise the towel's effectiveness., 2. Drying the Drying Towel: After washing, dry the towel on a low heat setting. High heat can damage the delicate microfiber fibers.2. Drying the Drying Towel: After washing, dry the towel on a low heat setting. High heat can damage the delicate microfiber fibers., 3. Washing Frequency: We recommend washing the drying towel after every 1-2 uses. Regular washing eliminates dirt accumulation and reduces the risk of scratching your vehicle's surface. Avoid using spray wax or fabric softener, as they can clog the towel and decrease its absorbency.
Fabric Type 70% Polyester / 30% Polyamide
Measurements
Item Dimensions L x W 36"L x 24"W
Size 24"x36" Double sided

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

Customers say

Customers find this car drying towel superior to traditional ones, noting it dries entire SUVs in one swipe and works better than squeegees. The towel is super absorbent, leaving no streaks or marks, and customers consider it well worth the money.

    This is the best drying towel I have used yet. Makes light work of drying a car in no time. Cleans large panels quickly and streak free. Definitely recommend.

  • H Brown
    5 out of 5 stars
    Perfect Drying Towel – Worth Every Penny
    Reviewed in the United States on September 8, 2025
    Size: 24"x36" Double sidedColor: Crimson
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I’ve used a lot of microfiber drying towels over the years, but the Blackline Car Drying Towel is easily the best I’ve come across. The size (2ft x 3ft) is perfect — large enough to cover a big section of the car in one pass, but still easy to handle without dragging on the ground. The 1300 GSM thickness is no joke; it feels plush and premium right out of the package.

    What impressed me most is just how much water this thing absorbs. After a full wash on my sedan, it had no problem drying the entire car without needing to be wrung out once. Even on glass and mirrors, it leaves no streaks, no spots, and definitely no scratches. I used to spend extra time chasing water drips around the trim, but this towel pulls everything up cleanly the first time.

    The edges are soft and reinforced, so I’m confident it won’t fray or scratch over time. I also appreciate that it washes well — no lint, no loss of absorbency after a few uses. It feels like a professional-grade towel but at a fair price, which explains why so many detailers recommend it.

    If you care about your car’s finish, this is the towel to get. It’s one of those detailing tools that instantly makes the process easier and more enjoyable. I won’t go back to cheap, thin towels after using this. Highly recommend!

    Read moreRead less

  • Ralph Schwarz
    4 out of 5 stars
    Good towel. Not perfect. If you expect a single pass spotless dry, this misses a bit.
    Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026
    Size: 24"x36" Double sidedColor: Charcoal Grey
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I bought the Blackline drying towel. For my first pull on my hood after a wash. It works. I dried the entire car with one towel. Absorption is strong and it feels soft on the paint.

    The performance falls short of the hype. It leaves light streaks in certain areas. You can see it in my video. I had to make a second pass on panels to get a clean finish.

    What I noticed:

    • Great water pickup on the first pass

    • Safe on paint with no scratching

    • Large size makes drying fast

    • Streaking on darker panels

    • Requires a quick follow up wipe in spots

    Good towel. Not perfect. If you expect a single pass spotless dry, this misses a bit. If you are fine doing a quick second wipe, it does the job well.

  • Dexter
    5 out of 5 stars
    Only towel I’ll use on my cars!
    Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2025
    Size: 24"x36" Double sidedColor: Charcoal Grey
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Overall:

    The Blackline Drying Towel is an excellent car drying tool. It's highly absorbent, incredibly soft, and delivers a streak-free finish. While it's a bit pricier than some alternatives, the superior performance and quality make it a worthwhile investment for anyone serious about car detailing. If you're looking for a top-tier drying towel, I highly recommend the Blackline. It has definitely earned a place in my car care arsenal.

    Pros:

    Absorbency: This towel is seriously thirsty! The 1300 GSM (grams per square meter) rating definitely lives up to the hype. It soaks up a ton of water, making quick work of drying even large vehicles. I found I needed to wring it out far less frequently than with other microfiber towels I've used.

    Size: The XL size is fantastic. It's big enough to cover a large area quickly, reducing the number of passes needed and making the drying process much more efficient. It also makes it easier to handle and fold.

    Softness: The microfiber is incredibly soft and plush. I was initially worried about scratching my paint, but this towel glided smoothly and left a streak-free finish. Even after several washes, it remains soft and gentle.

    Streak-Free Drying: This is perhaps the most important factor, and the Blackline towel delivers. I've been very impressed with how effectively it dries my car without leaving streaks or water spots.

    Quality: The construction feels solid and durable. The stitching seems well done, and the towel has held up well through multiple washes. It feels like a premium product.

    Cons:

    Price: Compared to some other microfiber towels, the Blackline is a bit more expensive. However, in my opinion, the performance and quality justify the cost. You get what you pay for.

    Care: Like most high-quality microfiber towels, it requires specific care. You need to avoid fabric softeners and wash it separately to maintain its absorbency and softness. This isn't a huge drawback, but something to be aware of.

    Read moreRead less

Product summary presents key product information
Keyboard shortcut  shift + alt + opt + D

Product Summary: Blackline 24"x36" Twisted-Loop Car Drying Towel, 1300GSM, Streak Free, Lint Free, Reusable - Car Accessories, Microfiber Cleaning Cloth for Car, Truck, SUV - One Pass is All You Need

From Blackline

4.7 out of 5 stars, 2,201 ratings

Customer reviews

500+ bought in past week

Price

One-time purchase: TWD 1,581.13

Purchasing options

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • NO WATER SPOTS OR STREAKS - Only one pass and your car will be 100% dry, streak-free and will have zero water spots. Our Twisted Loop Technology allows the towel to glide across the surface of your car and pick up every single drop of water. It can absorb up to an entire gallon!
  • SIZE MATTERS - The Blackline Drying Towel is 2ft x 3ft allowing it to quickly dry the surface area of your vehicle. Not only is it huge, but it glides across your vehicle without scratching the paint at all. Size does matter when it comes to car drying towels.
  • ULTRA-ABSORBENT & EFFECTIVE - We designed the Blackline Drying Towel to be built for speed and performance. This towel strives to be the most absorbent, quick-drying towel on the car detailing market. It absorbs more than 6x its weight in water and can dry your entire car in one go!
  • ONE TOWEL IS ALL YOU NEED - Say goodbye to using towel after towel. It might be crazy to think about, but one pass is all you need with the Blackline Drying Towel. Your car will be completely dry and all you need is a single towel.
  • APPROVED BY PRO DETAILERS - Used and loved by professional car detailers and weekend warriors alike. It was specifically designed to be easy to use and to guarantee an effective drying experience every single time.

Product Description

The Blackline Twisted Loop Drying Towel is made from High-Grade Korean Split Microfiber. It's woven with Twisted Loop Technology, which increases the surface area of the towel, making it more absorbent than any normal microfiber towel. The Blackline Twisted Loop Drying Towel leaves behind a streak-free finish after drying, saving you time, and the headache of drying the vehicle multiple times over. - Ultra Absorbent Korean Split Microfiber Edgeless Microfiber Towel - 70/30 Polyester/Polyamide Twisted Loop Blend - 24" x 36" Dimensions Making Them Extremely Large Microfiber Towels - Double-Sided Drying Most Drying Towels For Cars Are Only One-Sided, Which Limits The Drying Capability - Scratch Resistant Drying Microfiber Cloth

Options Available

Size

  • 24"x36" Double sided

Color

  • Aqua
  • Charcoal Grey
  • Crimson
